data.title: SUI Price Drops Following Cetus Theft Incident
data.description: According to Odaily, the price of SUI experienced a decline after the Cetus theft incident, falling to $3.9. Recently, a significant investor, who has been profiting from Bitcoin long positions, opened a 10x long position on SUI. The investor currently holds 3,554,305 SUI, valued at $14.46 million, with an entry price of $4.01146. The position has already generated an unrealized profit of $264,000.

data.title: Cetus Hacker Converts USDC to Ethereum on Ethereum Mainnet
data.description: According to BlockBeats, a recent monitoring report by @ai_9684xtpa revealed that the Cetus hacker has converted 57.66 million USDC into 22,114 ETH on the Ethereum mainnet. The average purchase price for the Ethereum was $2,652.

data.title: SlowMist CISO: Cetus theft is suspected to be caused by a vulnerability due to calculation accuracy issues
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: SlowMist Chief Information Security Officer @im23pds said that preliminary analysis of the cause of Cetus theft was suspected to be a vulnerability caused by calculation accuracy issues.

data.title: A whale opened a 10x SUI long order and currently holds 3554305 SUI
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to @ai_9684xtpa monitoring, SUI recovered today’s gains due to the Cetus theft and fell to $3.9 in a short period of time. The whale that “printed money” on BTC long orders in recent days immediately opened a 10x long order. It currently holds 3554305 SUI (14.46 million US dollars) with an opening price of $4.01146, and has made a floating profit of $264,000.

data.title: The Cetus hacker has used 57.66 million USDC that was transferred to the Ethereum mainnet to buy 22,114 ETH
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to @ai_9684xtpa’s monitoring, the hacker used the classic ETH buying script. The Cetus hacker has used 57.66 million USDC that was cross-chained to the Ethereum mainnet to buy 22,114 ETH, with an average purchase price of $2,652. The Ethereum address currently holds a total of $59.56 million in assets, of which 98.3% are ETH, and there are 1 million USDC and other small tokens left.

data.title: BSC Chain Leads DEX Trading Volume in 24 Hours
data.description: According to Odaily, data from DeFiLlama reveals that the BSC chain has achieved a decentralized exchange (DEX) trading volume exceeding $7.15 billion in the past 24 hours. This figure surpasses the combined trading volumes of Solana, which recorded $3.789 billion, and Ethereum, with $2.642 billion, positioning BSC at the top. BscScan data further indicates that the number of daily active addresses on the BSC chain is nearly 2 million, with daily transactions reaching 12.58 million.

data.title: Binance News: Binance Adds World Liberty Financial USD (USD1) to Earn, Buy Crypto, Convert, and Margin Services
data.description: Binance has announced the integration of World Liberty Financial USD (USD1) across multiple key product offerings, including Binance Simple Earn, Buy Crypto, Binance Convert, and Margin Trading, reinforcing its commitment to supporting a broader stablecoin ecosystem.Key Activation TimesProductFeature Activation DateTime (UTC)Simple EarnUSD1 Flexible ProductsMay 22, 2025Buy CryptoAvailable via VISA, Mastercard, Apple Pay, Google Pay, RevolutWithin 1 hour of spot listingBinance ConvertTrade USD1 against BTC, USDT, and more at 0 feesWithin 1 hour of spot listingMarginUSD1/USDT pair (Cross & Isolated) + borrowable assetMay 22, 2025 What Is USD1?World Liberty Financial USD (USD1) is a regulated stablecoin designed to maintain a 1:1 peg with the U.S. dollar. It is part of the growing set of fiat-backed stable assets that enable low-cost, real-time settlement, payments, and trading across the digital economy.Feature DetailsBinance Simple EarnStarting May 22 at 12:00 UTC, users can subscribe to Flexible Products for USD1, earning passive rewards while maintaining flexible access to their funds.Buy CryptoOnce USD1 is listed on Binance Spot, users will be able to purchase USD1 using:Visa & MastercardGoogle PayApple PayRevolutOr fiat balances directly through Binance's “Buy Crypto” interface.Binance Convert (Zero Fees)Within 1 hour of spot listing, USD1 will be added to Binance Convert, enabling instant, fee-free conversions with major pairs including BTC and USDT.Binance MarginUSD1 will also become a borrowable asset on both Cross and Isolated Margin, with trading support for the USD1/USDT pair launching at 12:20 UTC on May 22.

data.title: BSC on-chain DEX 24-hour transaction volume exceeds US$7.15 billion, surpassing the sum of Solana and Ethereum
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to DeFiLlama data, in the past 24 hours, the transaction volume of DEX on the BSC chain exceeded US$7.15 billion, surpassing the sum of Solana (US$3.789 billion) and Ethereum (US$2.642 billion), ranking first. BscScan data shows that the number of daily active addresses is nearly 2 million, and the number of daily transactions is 12.58 million.

data.title: The stolen funds from Cetus have exceeded 260 million US dollars, and about 60 million USDC have been transferred across chains
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Lookonchain monitoring, the stolen funds of Cetus have exceeded 260 million US dollars, and about 60 million USDC have been transferred across the chain to Ethereum to exchange for ETH.

data.title: Strategy to sell 10% preferred stock worth $2.1 billion
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to market news: Strategy plans to sell 10% of preferred shares, worth US$2.1 billion.

data.title: How bond market helped push BTC to all-time high
data.description:
As demand for trillions of dollars worth of US Treasuries turned bearish, BTC investors became more bullish than ever.
source: https://protos.com/how-bond-market-helped-push-btc-to-all-time-high/

data.title: Cetus Protocol Temporarily Suspends Smart Contract Amid Security Incident
data.description:
According to PANews, the decentralized exchange Cetus Protocol, part of the SUI ecosystem, announced on the X platform that it has temporarily suspended its smart contract due to a detected security incident. The team is actively investigating the matter and plans to release a detailed statement soon.

Earlier reports indicated that the attack on Cetus Protocol resulted in losses exceeding $200 million, with hackers beginning to transfer USDC assets.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 111,000 USDT with a 4.27% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On May 22, 2025, 11:52 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 111,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 111,066.773438 USDT, with a narrowed 4.27% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Cetus Protocol: The protocol smart contract has been temporarily suspended for security reasons
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Cetus Protocol posted on the X platform, "We have detected an incident. For security reasons, our smart contract has been temporarily suspended. The team is currently investigating this incident. Further investigation statements will be released soon."

data.title: Bitget Onchain Trading (Onchain) Launches Project ALLO (RWA)
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Bitget Onchain Trading (Onchain) launched the project ALLO (RWA) and launched an asset trading event, which all users can participate in. Trading RWA tokens worth $100 will have the opportunity to receive a BGB reward worth $50, and the total prize pool is worth $150,000 BGB. The rewards will be distributed to the first 500 users in order of completion, and another 2,500 places will be airdropped according to the last digit of the UID after the event. The event time is from 20:00 on May 22 to 20:00 on May 24 (UTC+8).

data.title: Short positions surge after Bitcoin hits record high, market sentiment turns cautious
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News oinalyze data shows that after Bitcoin broke through $110,000 to set a record high, a large number of short positions appeared in the market, causing the long-short ratio to drop to the lowest level since September 2022. Although trading volume has surged 74% in the past 24 hours, most traders chose to short, indicating that the market is skeptical about the current upward trend. In addition, the increase in the number of open contracts has exceeded the increase in Bitcoin prices, showing an intensification of leveraged trading. This trend began on April 21, when Bitcoin broke through $85,000. Some traders believed that it had reached a cyclical high and that subsequent increases could form a double top structure. (CoinDesk)

data.title: The stolen tokens on Cetus have not been sold yet, and emotional panic caused the tokens to plummet in a short period of time
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to @ai_9684xtpa, the largest DEX Cetus on the Sui network was stolen for about $200 million. The hacker address did two things in the past half hour: 
1. Withdraw token liquidity
2. Transfer a large amount of USDC from Sui to the Ethereum mainnet (because most of the stablecoins used in the token group pool are USDC, which accounts for the majority) Have all the stolen tokens on Cetus been sold? ——Not yet. The current short-term plunge in tokens is mainly due to the withdrawal of the pool + emotional panic.

data.title: U.S. Tax Bill Advances Amid Debt Concerns
data.description: According to Odaily, a tax bill signed by U.S. President Donald Trump narrowly passed in the House of Representatives with a vote of 215 to 214, with one abstention. The legislation is part of a multi-trillion-dollar package aimed at preventing tax increases at the end of the year, albeit at the cost of increasing the national debt. The bill will now move to the Senate, where Republican groups are advocating for significant amendments. Lawmakers plan to vote on the approval by August. The proposal includes raising the U.S. debt ceiling by $4 trillion. The Treasury Department has warned that without an increase, the U.S. could face a default as early as August or September, adding urgency to the timeline.
